overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along an abandoned beachfront area. The player moves from a sandy beach with a large roller coaster structure extending over the water, through derelict beachfront buildings and palm-lined paths, ending at a dark underpass entrance. The environment features futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers contrasting with decaying coastal infrastructure.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with a large roller coaster structure visible over the water. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The camera walks forward along the sand, passing palm trees, then turns left away from the ocean toward abandoned beachfront structures.

red and white striped concrete blocks blocking access
elevated concrete highway or monorail track running parallel to the coast
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Moving through the abandoned beachfront, the camera passes derelict buildings with graffiti and concrete barriers. The ocean and roller coaster disappear from view as the path ascends a sandy slope. An overpass structure becomes visible on the left, with futuristic skyscrapers still towering in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined dirt path along abandoned coastal buildings

events.description: returning to beach view with roller coaster visible again over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along dirt path lined with palm trees with roller coaster visible in distance

rusted metal barrier along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a dirt path lined with palm trees, with an abandoned building on the left and metal fencing on the right. The roller coaster structure reappears in the distance as the path returns toward the coastal area, with the ocean visible again on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass entrance with concrete stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward a dark underpass entrance, passing two standing NPCs near an abandoned pink car. The lighting shifts dramatically as the camera approaches the concrete stairs leading into the shadowed tunnel, with the overpass structure looming overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open beachfront into the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins on a sunny beach with a massive roller coaster structure extending over the water, moving past palm trees before turning away from the ocean toward a cluster of abandoned beachfront structures. As the camera ascends a sandy slope, the coastline disappears behind derelict buildings and graffiti-covered concrete barriers, though futuristic skyscrapers remain visible in the distance. The scene then shifts back toward the coast along a dirt path lined with metal fencing and palm trees, bringing the roller coaster and ocean back into view. Finally, the camera turns away from the light to pass a pink car and two NPCs, moving toward the dark entrance of a shadowed tunnel beneath a looming overpass.
